name: Chocolate Nut Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a 10 x 15 inch cookie sheet with Pam.
2. Lay the crackers in the pan, touching sides.
3. Sprinkle nuts evenly over top.
4. Cook butter and brown sugar, stirring constantly, until it boils.
5. Boil for 3 minutes without stirring.
6. Pour over crackers and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 8 - 10 minutes at 400 degrees in an oven until bubbly and slightly darker around the edges.
8. Cool completely in pan.
9. Break into pieces.
10. Store in airtight container.
